title: sorghastrum nutans subvar. canescens
intro: Sorghastrum nutans subvar. canescens, also known as silver drop or gray indiangrass, is a perennial grass native to the Great Plains region of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sorghastrum nutans subvar. canescens include reducing inflammation, promoting skin healing, and supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in poultices and topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
